plain_definition: A confirmation VARA issues for one specific virtual-asset activity, VA Proprietary Trading, stating that a firm may carry out that activity without holding a full VA Licence -- provided the firm has still registered with VARA.
formal_definition: Per VARA's circular 'Virtual Assets Licensing Activities Issuance from February in the Emirate of Dubai [excluding DIFC]', VA Proprietary Trading is an activity that must be registered and be granted a No Objection Certificate from VARA to confirm that the activity may be undertaken without a VA Licence -- distinguishing it from the eight other virtual-asset activities listed in VARA's Full Market Product Regulatory Framework, each of which requires a full commercial VA Licence.
